# unison-mastra

> TypeScript package that gives [Mastra](https://mastra.ai) agents persistent
> long-term memory backed by the [Unison brain](https://unisonlabs.ai) — recall
> relevant context before each LLM turn and persist exchanges for future sessions.

**Agents: start with [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md)** — it tells you how to install the
package, authenticate with `UNISON_TOKEN`, and attach `UnisonMastraMemory` to a
Mastra `Agent`.

## Docs
- [README.md](README.md): install, quickstart, options, env vars, exports
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): how an agent installs, authenticates, and wires `UnisonMastraMemory`
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md): build, test, typecheck, PR checklist
- [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md): vulnerability reporting and credential handling

## Usage
- Install: `npm i @unisonlabs/mastra @mastra/core`
- Auth: `export UNISON_TOKEN=usk_...`
- Attach: `new Agent({ memory: new UnisonMastraMemory({ token: process.env.UNISON_TOKEN }) })`
- Recall: happens automatically via `getSystemMessage()` before each LLM turn
- Persist: call `memory.persistTurn(threadId, turns)` after each exchange

## Examples
- [src/](src/): TypeScript source — `UnisonMastraMemory`, `UnisonMemory`, `UnisonClient`
